73944.subject: Bringing Back the Burn
73944.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

Hi all, happy Tuesday! 

You’ve had another chance to buy bitcoin at $69,420 this morning. ETF outflows continued Monday to the tune of $484 million.

Today we look at the latest attempt to tweak SOL tokenomics with SIMD 547.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Three months into the Iran conflict, the Strait of Hormuz is still effectively shut, peace talks [have stalled](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/01/iran-us-negotiations-strait-of-hormuz.html), and yet crude is sitting in the low-to-mid $90s. The back and forth is like a bad movie sequel, met with indifference by market observers. A chokepoint for a meaningful share of seaborne crude has been closed for a full quarter, and the price action says the market has either priced a workaround or simply stopped believing the closure will continue into the summer.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/590072ee-74f7-452b-8826-75654014cda0/image.png?t=1780407078)
Caption: 

US equities remain near record highs, giving equity-linked indexes a boost, yet BTC closed -3.2% on a red day for crypto majors. Michael Saylor [followed through](https://x.com/BitcoinMagazine/status/2061418382872781289?s=20) on his [earlier hint](https://x.com/TreeNewsFeed/status/2051793792437506340) that Strategy would likely sell some bitcoin to fund its STRC dividend. The 32 BTC (or about $2.5M at a roughly $77k average) is minuscule compared to [the company’s ](https://blockworks.com/analytics/treasury-companies/bitcoin-treasury-companies)holdings, but the move erodes the myth that Saylor will [never sell](https://x.com/saylor/status/1886046076316041641?s=20).

The bigger story today on the downside starts with Privacy, the worst sector on the board at -4.7%.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f1639392-bc10-42cf-aa95-af92035a46cf/image.png?t=1780407078)
Caption: 

The week inside this index was ugly almost everywhere. Zama (ZAMA) was the lone holdout, choppy but up ~10% on the week despite a weekend scare. Last Friday, Circle froze Zama's confidential-USDC (cUSDC) pooled wrapper on Ethereum in response to a court order, [sweeping up](https://x.com/randhindi/status/2060671833674797162?s=20) innocent Zama depositors in the process, and the ZAMA token wobbled on the headline. Yesterday the matter [was resolved](https://x.com/randhindi/status/2061528858336342176?s=20) after the same court f

73938.subject: 📉 Bitcoin falls under 70K as Saylor sells
73938.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $69,411 (-4.4%) | **ETH** $1,977 (-0.3%) | **SOL** $79 (-2.5%)

* Nvidia CEO calls Marvell the [next trillion dollar company](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2061650323496976699?s=20) — MRVL gains [over 20%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/MRVL/) premarket

* Anthropic confidentially [files for IPO](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2061478081328459893?s=20)

* S&P 500 closes at [another ATH](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2061546456306073636?s=20)

* [Strategy sells $2.3M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2061423542248366209?s=20) worth of Bitcoin for first time since 2022

* [MT. Gox moves $739M](https://x.com/arkham/status/2061673833913106934?s=20) worth of Bitcoin

* [Iran threatens](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2061442620983787689?s=20) to end negotiations and block the Strait of Hormuz

* Bitcoin ETFs record their [11th straight day ](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2061688419546501362?s=20)of net outflows as Bitcoin briefly falls below $70k

* Polymarket faces heat after resolving [MSTR Sells Bitcoin Before March 31 to “No”](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2061737129525575848?s=20)

* Hewlett Packard (HPE) [gains over 33%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2061548386906415358?s=20) after stronger than expected earnings

* [Google raises $80B](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2061548362126795065?s=20) in capital to expand AI infrastructure including a [$10B investment](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2061548444284776934?s=20) from Berkshire Hathaway

* Hyperliquid hits new ATHs in [Price](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2061593649549308210?s=20) and [Open Interest](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2061737063683162389?s=20)

* Twitter launches [“React with Video”](https://x.com/nikitabier/status/2061617139484876849?s=20) option

* [24/7 CME crypto futures](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2061641333912272945?s=20) trade over $50M of volume on their opening weekend

* OpenSea teases [perps platform](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2061723289794294104?s=20) powered by Hyperliquid

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://ww

73936.subject: Automatická správa: Notifikácia o úhrade diaľničnej známky
73936.body:
Notifikácia o úhrade diaľničnej známky pre vozidlo s evidenčným číslom vozidla LE066BI 
  
  
 Vážený Zákazník, 
  
 správca výberu úhrady diaľničných známok za užívanie vymedzených úsekov diaľnic a rýchlostných ciest v Slovenskej republike, Vám prostredníctvom tejto automaticky vygenerovanej e-mailovej správy na základe Vami realizovanej úhrady diaľničnej známky, evidovanej v rámci evidencie úhrad diaľničných známok k vozidlu/prípojnému vozidlu s evidenčným číslom vozidla LE066BI a krajinou registrácie Slovensko, zasiela doklad „Potvrdenie o úhrade diaľničnej známky, zjednodušená faktúra". 
Diaľničná známka je platná v období odo dňa 02.06.2026 do dňa 02.06.2026 vrátane. 
  
 Upozornenie: 
  
 
Na túto automaticky vygenerovanú e-mailovú správu neodpovedajte. Bližšie informácie týkajúce sa diaľničnej známky môžete získať na internetovom portáli www.eznamka.sk a/alebo prostredníctvom zákazníckej linky na tel. čísle +421 232 777 777. 
  
 S pozdravom
 
  
 Národná diaľničná spoločnosť, a.s. 
  
 T: +421 232 777 777
W: www.eznamka.sk

Fear and Greed is at
29
(Fear)
and BTC has slipped to
$69K
this morning, extending yesterday's slide after Strategy
disclosed its first Bitcoin sale since 2022. The market is
testing levels not seen since April.

The session is mixed. HYPE hit a new all-time high even as BTC
fell. Anthropic filed for a US IPO ahead of OpenAI. Binance
opened thousands of US stocks to global users. And Toncoin is
reverting to a name that carries a complicated regulatory
history.
Pressure on BTC, momentum elsewhere. Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Anthropic Just Filed for a US IPO Ahead of OpenAI

Anthropic submitted a confidential S-1 draft to the SEC on
June 1, becoming the first major AI lab to file for a US IPO
ahead of OpenAI.

The company raised funds at a valuation near $965 billion in
late May. Its valuation has more than doubled since February.

What was Anthropic's valuation when it raised funds just three
months ago in February?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/Jb4DoTzB7rrBYG6d9Omk3A~~/AAQRxRA~/Wy8l9l3R_yhELHeHySDFIs8OsWosNpLnhdWaWyiZpJpFHJE0Vp13h-c2PxOuvwYEK98ztE4nsmXFaWkyb8dEIahyclSkSW_Xipk5W3tBFSB3xnhJ8TA-zZF9gnkM2vwMma-OpnGLGrUlZyt3O1YZlpBtpHYyR2PQAk0okCGl8P8~ )
   Binance Just Opened Thousands of US Stocks to Global Users

Binance launched trading in more than 7,000 US-listed stocks
and ETFs for non-US customers on June 1, with zero-commission
trades funded b
